name: EauNmibc
title: EAU 2021 NMIBC Risk Group Calculator
description: EAU 2021 risk-group classifier for non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC). Stratifies Ta/T1 patients into Low / Intermediate / High / Very High groups and reports 1-, 5-, and 10-year progression probabilities under WHO 2004/2016 and/or WHO 1973 grading. Source: Sylvester RJ et al., Eur Urol 2021;79(4):480–488.

valueExpression.expression: iif(%g2004.exists(), iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 4, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not(), 'High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g2004 = 'LG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate')))))), {})

valueExpression.name: risk2004
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 4, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not(), 'High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g2004 = 'LG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate'))))))

valueExpression.name: risk2004
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 4, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not(), 'High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g2004 = 'LG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate'))))))

valueExpression.name: risk2004
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 4, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not(), 'High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g2004 = 'LG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate'))))))

valueExpression.name: risk2004
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 4, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g2004 = 'HG' and %cisYes.not(), 'High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g2004 = 'LG' and %cisYes.not() and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate'))))))

iif(%g2004.exists(), iif(%risk2004 = 'Low', 'Single immediate post-TURBT intravesical chemotherapy instillation; no further adjuvant therapy.', iif(%risk2004 = 'Intermediate', 'Intravesical chemotherapy OR 1-year full-dose BCG induction + maintenance at 3, 6, 12 months.', iif(%risk2004 = 'High', 'Full-dose BCG for 1-3 years (maintenance at 3, 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36 months); discuss radical cystectomy.', 'Radical cystectomy preferred; full-dose BCG 1-3 years if cystectomy declined or unfit.'))), {})

iif(%g1973.exists(), iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'Very High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3', 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G2', iif(%arf = 0, 'Intermediate', 'High'), iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g1973 = 'G1' and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate'))))))), {})

valueExpression.name: risk1973
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'Very High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3', 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G2', iif(%arf = 0, 'Intermediate', 'High'), iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g1973 = 'G1' and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate')))))))

valueExpression.name: risk1973
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'Very High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3', 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G2', iif(%arf = 0, 'Intermediate', 'High'), iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g1973 = 'G1' and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate')))))))

valueExpression.name: risk1973
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'Very High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3', 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G2', iif(%arf = 0, 'Intermediate', 'High'), iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g1973 = 'G1' and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate')))))))

valueExpression.name: risk1973
valueExpression.expression: iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes and %arf >= 1, 'Very High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3' and %cisYes.not() and %arf >= 3, 'Very High', iif(%cisYes, 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G3', 'High', iif(%stageCode = 'T1' and %g1973 = 'G2', iif(%arf = 0, 'Intermediate', 'High'), iif(%stageCode = 'Ta' and %g1973 = 'G1' and %arf = 0, 'Low', iif(%arf >= 3, 'High', 'Intermediate')))))))

iif(%g1973.exists(), iif(%risk1973 = 'Low', 'Single immediate post-TURBT intravesical chemotherapy instillation; no further adjuvant therapy.', iif(%risk1973 = 'Intermediate', 'Intravesical chemotherapy OR 1-year full-dose BCG induction + maintenance at 3, 6, 12 months.', iif(%risk1973 = 'High', 'Full-dose BCG for 1-3 years (maintenance at 3, 6, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36 months); discuss radical cystectomy.', 'Radical cystectomy preferred; full-dose BCG 1-3 years if cystectomy declined or unfit.'))), {})
